package bundles all Vault facets and provides deterministic deployment via the DiamondPackageCallBackFactory. The Vault Diamond provides: - Transient accounting: unlock(), settle(), sendTo() (IVaultMain) - Swap operations: swap() (IVaultMain) - Liquidity operations: addLiquidity(), removeLiquidity() (IVaultMain) - Buffer operations: erc4626BufferWrapOrUnwrap() (IVaultExtension) - Pool token operations: BPT transfers (IVaultMain) - Query functions: getPoolTokens(), etc. (IVaultMain/Extension) - Registration: registerPool(), initialize() (IVaultExtension) - Admin functions: pause, fees, etc. (IVaultAdmin) - Recovery: removeLiquidityRecovery() (IVaultMain) - Diamond introspection: facets(), facetAddress(), etc. (IDiamondLoupe) Usage: 1. Deploy this package with all facet references 2. Call deployVault() to create vault instances 3. Each vault instance is a Diamond proxy with all vault functionality","kind":"dev","methods":{"deployVault(uint256,uint256,uint32,uint32,address,address)":{"params":{"authorizer":"Initial authorizer contract","bufferPeriodDuration":"Duration of buffer period after pause window","minimumTradeAmount":"Minimum swap amount in scaled18","minimumWrapAmount":"Minimum wrap amount in native decimals","pauseWindowDuration":"Duration of pause window from deployment","protocolFeeController":"Protocol fee controller contract"},"returns":{"vault":"The deployed vault address"}},"facetAddresses()":{"details":"Note: The factory adds additional facets (ERC165, DiamondLoupe, etc.)"},"facetCuts()":{"details":"Note: The factory adds additional facets (ERC165, params.bufferPeriodDuration: Duration of buffer period after pause window
params.minimumWrapAmount: Minimum wrap amount in native decimals
params.pauseWindowDuration: Duration of pause window from deployment

facetAddresses().details: Note: The factory adds additional facets (ERC165, DiamondLoupe, etc.)

facetCuts().details: Note: The factory adds additional facets (ERC165, DiamondLoupe, etc.)

initAccount(bytes).details: Called via delegatecall from the proxy during deployment.

postDeploy(address).details: Vault doesn't need any post-deployment registration.

calcSalt(bytes).notice: Calculates the deterministic salt for deployment.

deployVault(uint256,uint256,uint32,uint3.notice: Deploy a new Vault Diamond instance.

facetAddresses().notice: Returns all facet addresses (package-provided facets only).

facetCuts().notice: Returns the facet cuts for diamond construction.

facetInterfaces().notice: Returns all interface IDs supported by deployed vaults.

initAccount(bytes).notice: Initializes the vault storage on the deployed proxy.

updatePkg(address,bytes).notice: Updates an existing deployment (not supported for Vault).
